match.userMessage:
Camera holds a locked static macro close-up on the vanity. Scarlett swipes coral lipstick steadily across her lower lip from left to right, then blots once on the linen tissue. She pauses and forms a soft closed-mouth smile as the color settles. Hand moves with deliberate precision. Slight fabric shift on sleeve as arm lowers.

Ambient sounds: quiet minimal room tone with faint fabric rustle. soft lipstick applicator swipe, gentle tissue blot.
